title: Customize Date options
excerpt:
Add ability to customise the date column to the format add the following options: 

DD/MM/YY
MM/DD/YY
MM/DD
DD/MM

posts.author: talbenatar (Tal Benatar)
posts.cookedHtml:
Add ability to customise the date column to the format add the following options:

  1. DD/MM/YY
  2. MM/DD/YY
  3. MM/DD
  4. DD/MM
